title: chore(deps): update dependency jscodeshift to v0.13.0
body:

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [jscodeshift](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift) | [`0.7.0` -> `0.13.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/jscodeshift/0.7.0/0.13.0) | [![age](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/jscodeshift/0.13.0/age-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/jscodeshift/0.13.0/adoption-slim)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/jscodeshift/0.13.0/compatibility-slim/0.7.0)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://badges.renovateapi.com/packages/npm/jscodeshift/0.13.0/confidence-slim/0.7.0)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>facebook/jscodeshift</summary>

### [`v0.13.0`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​0130-2021-06-26)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/0.12.0...0.13.0)

##### Added

-   Added a `--fail-on-error` flag to return a `1` error code when errors were found ([#​416](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/issues/416), [@​marcodejongh](https://togithub.com/marcodejongh))
-   Created `template.asyncExpression` ([#​405](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/issues/405), [@​jedwards1211](https://togithub.com/jedwards1211))

##### Changed

-   Removed lodash dependency from tsx parser ([#​432](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/issues/432), [@​JHilker](https://togithub.com/JHilker) and [@​robyoder](https://togithub.com/robyoder))

### [`v0.12.0`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​0120-2021-04-21)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/0.11.0...0.12.0)

##### Changed

-   Allow transform to be a Promise ([#​237](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/issues/237), [@​rektide](https://togithub.com/rektide))
-   Support newer TypeScript syntax by upgrading to newer Babel parser ([#​410](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/issues/410), [@​wdoug](https://togithub.com/wdoug) and [@​mfeckie](https://togithub.com/mfeckie))

### [`v0.11.0`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​0110-2020-09-01)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/0.10.0...0.11.0)

##### Changed

-   Updated `recast` to latest

### [`v0.10.0`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​0100-2020-06-01)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/13bf8067f5a1fc1010247c78e8ac01c543d5dc2e...0.10.0)

##### Changed

-   Updated `flow-parser` to latest, and enabled Flow Enums parsing by default when using Flow parser

### [`v0.9.0`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/edd9fecfd32776cbcc99245b543637a2eb01b69c...13bf8067f5a1fc1010247c78e8ac01c543d5dc2e)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/edd9fecfd32776cbcc99245b543637a2eb01b69c...13bf8067f5a1fc1010247c78e8ac01c543d5dc2e)

### [`v0.8.0`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​080-2020-05-03)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/4acfd61c02cc4c05dd8517b05eb87d02e4abac76...edd9fecfd32776cbcc99245b543637a2eb01b69c)

##### Changed

-   Dropped support for Node versions 6 and 8

### [`v0.7.1`](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/v0.7.0...4acfd61c02cc4c05dd8517b05eb87d02e4abac76)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/facebook/jscodeshift/compare/v0.7.0...4acfd61c02cc4c05dd8517b05eb87d02e4abac76)

</details>
